priority_matrix.gap: Horizontal cross-check layer not yet designed between Whale, News, Onchain, Technical before central core.
priority_matrix.name: Hub-and-Spoke Cross-Check Pipeline
priority_matrix.why: Merkez çekirdek sarsılırsa tüm kaynaklar körleşmesin; yatay çapraz denetim ilk kalkan olmalı.

priority_matrix.gap: Latency budget not yet defined for multi-layer analysis + False-positive budget not yet defined for noisy market regimes.
priority_matrix.name: Latency And False-Positive Budget
priority_matrix.why: Motorlar piyasa yükünde DoS/timeout veya alarm obezitesiyle operatörü kör etmemeli.

priority_matrix.gap: AI chatbot authority boundary not yet formally locked.
priority_matrix.name: AI Chatbot Hard Authority Boundary
priority_matrix.why: Prompt injection ve yetki taşması engellenmeden AI dış dünya, runtime, trade veya wallet alanına yaklaşamaz.

priority_matrix.gap: Whale wallet source taxonomy not yet defined.
priority_matrix.name: Whale Wallet Source Taxonomy
priority_matrix.why: Balina verisi sınıflanmadan fake whale / gerçek whale ayrımı yapılamaz.

priority_matrix.gap: Fake whale / real whale separation not yet defined.
priority_matrix.name: Fake Whale Separation
priority_matrix.why: Manipülatif cüzdan davranışı gerçek balina davranışı gibi puanlanmamalı.

priority_matrix.gap: Technical analysis signal contract not yet defined.
priority_matrix.name: Technical Signal Contract
priority_matrix.why: Teknik sinyal trade authority değildir; signal contract ve false-positive guard gerekir.

priority_matrix.gap: System monitoring runtime boundary not yet defined.
priority_matrix.name: System Monitoring Runtime Boundary
priority_matrix.why: Gözetleme ile runtime müdahale sınırı ayrılmalı.

priority_matrix.gap: Human approval integrity needs final operational contract.
priority_matrix.name: Human Approval Integrity Contract
priority_matrix.why: İnsan onayı sözlü/doktrinsel değil, operasyonel kanıt kontratı olmalı.

priority_matrix.gap: Emergency kill switch remains doctrine-level; runtime binding not planned in this step.
priority_matrix.name: Emergency Kill Switch Operational Contract
priority_matrix.why: Kill switch runtime bağlanmadan önce açıkça ayrı fazda doğrulanmalı.

priority_matrix.gap: Live/API/read-only progression remains blocked until later explicit approval.
priority_matrix.name: Read-Only Live Progression Approval Gate
priority_matrix.why: NOAPI çıkışı ancak hard gate kapanışı ve açık onay sonrası olabilir.

priority_matrix.gap: Maintenance and repair recommendation policy not yet defined.
priority_matrix.name: Maintenance Repair Recommendation Policy
priority_matrix.why: Güvenli öneri sistemi kurulabilir; otomatik apply yine yasak kalır.

priority_matrix.gap: Training dataset and label policy not yet formally locked.
priority_matrix.name: Training Dataset And Label Policy
priority_matrix.why: Eğitim kalitesi için gerekli; ancak canlı API çıkışı için ilk üç hard gate kadar acil değil.

priority_matrix.gap: Hybrid AI final doctrine not yet sealed.
priority_matrix.name: Hybrid AI Final Doctrine
priority_matrix.why: Deterministik çekirdek + AI asistan + memory + GPU/export nihai doktrin olarak kapanmalı.

red_team_verdict: NOAPI exit, API/RPC, live feed, runtime binding, live decision, trade, wallet access, private key access, and outbound packet are forbidden until all three hard gates are closed and explicitly verified.
